reason field absent from every PUT save — guaranteed 400 on all real saves
Race condition: duplicate-email guard and user creation are not in the same atomic block

Weak TOTP secret encryption: single SHA-256 of SECRET_KEY used as Fernet key

send_mail fires INSIDE transaction.atomic() in the invitation verb (side-effect before commit)
